programmes.show_description: Mind Hunters. A vicious serial killer drinks the blood of his victims. FBI agent Robert Ressler builds a psychological profile to help catch this murderer. S1, Ep4
Dead Men Do Talk. In Florida, a killer admits murder but no one can find his victim; and in Virginia, police have a decomposed body, but no suspect. Can forensics crack these cases? S1, Ep3
Not In Life, Not In Sleep. After Cristina goes missing, a man spotted on CCTV may hold the answers to the Minnesota woman's mysterious disappearance. S10, Ep11
Remember Me? After the shooting of a military veteran in his own home, detectives hunt a trail of CCTV across Kansas City to find his elusive killers. S10, Ep12

Elements Of Murder. Everyday substances can reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case. One case is disproved when cyanide is found in a woman's blood stream. S7, Ep91
Random Targets. Most victims of multiple murderers have a link with the killer or match their set of criteria. But some murders occur when victims appear to be picked at random. S7, Ep92
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
Death in the Delta. Shannon Sanderson was abducted after a successful night at the casino and police discovered she had been stalked and attacked for her $5,000 winnings. S4, Ep9
320k Con And Zoe Dronfield. Judge Rinder examines the real-life case of Debbie Davey, who fell victim to an elaborate scam orchestrated by a very close friend. S1, Ep4
Someone's Lying. In 2015, a hunter comes across a woman in the woods who has been murdered. Detectives unravel a web of dark secrets and lies that lead to a twisted killer. S2, Ep5
Dark Waters. A basketball star and his girlfriend disappear while sailing. Can investigators track down his brother, who's the only person who may know what happened? S1, Ep12
One Chance, One Look. In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. To catch the killer, detectives turn to surveillance video. S2, Ep11
Lewis Daynes. Breck Bedner was a 14-year-old boy who was groomed online and then murdered by 18-year-old Lewis Daynes. What caused this teenager to kill an innocent adolescent? S1, Ep10
Don't Forget Me. When a father-of-two suddenly vanishes, his friends hint that he led a secret life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth. S3, Ep9
In Sickness And In Health. When outgoing Beth Spaulding and shy Jason Risenburg meet, it seems a perfect match. But a series of disasters rip apart this once-perfect couple. S4, Ep3
Blue Nightmare. The murder of a popular EMT devastates the local police in Columbus, Georgia. The ensuing investigation tests the public's faith in law enforcement itself. S4, Ep13
Adam Vincent And Sophie Lancaster. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of Adam Vincent from Grimsby, who was severely menaced by a local family. S1, Ep5
One Chance, One Look. In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. To catch the killer, detectives turn to surveillance video. S2, Ep11
We Sell Babies. Detroit FBI begins uncovering a heartbreaking nationwide adoption scam, with the con artist praying on hundreds of hopeful families. S2, Ep4
Motor Mayhem. A parking lot showdown terrifies onlookers. A fender-bender leads a motorist on an epic chase. An aggressive driver uses an unusual weapon on her victim. S1, Ep1
Chaotic Confrontations. An off-duty police officer pulls a gun on another motorist. A machete-wielding man attacks a delivery driver, and an SUV nearly runs down a cyclist. S1, Ep2
What Happened To Skylar Neese? Every parent's worst nightmare comes true when a schoolgirl disappears without a trace. But surveillance footage leads cops to a shocking discovery. S1, Ep2
Death Grip. Fingerprints are an indisputable, time-tested method of establishing someone's ID. New computerisation means identification can now take only minutes. S1, Ep12
Camera Clues. Forensic photographers are often first at the scene of a crime, capturing vital clues on film; but what can these pictures reveal? S1, Ep5
The Wrong Look. In Texas, luxury bag designer Steven Gambles is gunned down after a night out. CCTV uncovers a trail of evidence that leads to an unlikely suspect. S10, Ep13
Cul-De-Sac. CCTV unlocks the final hours of a murdered 50-year-old lonely heart in Alabama. Did his quest for love on dating apps take a dark turn? S10, Ep14

Blind Trust. In New Mexico, police are called when 18-year-old Carly Martinez disappears from a local skating rink after a date with a friend. S8, Ep2
Shattered Vows. When a car crashed down an embankment, rescue workers scrambled to save a couple trapped inside, but what followed was an unexpected twist. S8, Ep3
The Price of Greed. Follows the FBI investigation into a robbery in which masked gunmen tied up employees at an armoured truck depot and left with $18.9 million. S5, Ep1

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: A Mother Knows. A soldier dies in a brutal attack during a night out with her unit. Police determine if a secret fear she told her mum is the motive for her murder. S12, Ep2
Meet Me At Midnight. 24-year-old Ryan Lane goes missing after receiving a mysterious call. Can CCTV footage help detectives find out what happened to this loving father? S7, Ep6
Ian Huntley. The murder of 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman in 2002 shocked the UK. Experts study media interviews of their killer, Ian Huntley, to expose his lies. S2, Ep1
Life Of The Party. When Doug meets Rose, they quickly fall in love and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. S4, Ep5
Too Good To Be True. Amanda Schmitt was doing her dream job nannying two children. Then, her relationship with the father turns romantic, but they don't get their happy ending. S4, Ep12

programmes.show_description: Buried Dreams. In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police retrace her last steps and unearth more than the secrets she harboured. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_description: A Mother's Manipulation. When investigators suspect a mother's involvement in the death of her two children, Ranger Jim Holland comes in to unearth the truth. S1, Ep8
A Deadly Secret. It's only when 35-year-old Virginia McCullough is arrested at her home for the murder of her parents that officers discover her gruesome secret. S1, Ep1
